# Alex Hernandez

> Senior Systems Engineer & Cloud Engineer — Orange County, CA

Alex Hernandez is a Senior Systems Engineer and Cloud Engineer based in Orange County, California, with 7+ years of experience designing and operating distributed cloud infrastructure, data platforms, and AI/ML systems at enterprise scale. Microsoft-certified Azure AI Engineer (AI-102).

## Who This Is

Alex operates at both the strategic and technical level: designing multi-tenant cloud architectures for Fortune 500 clients, leading $500K+ platform implementations, and writing the Python and Infrastructure-as-Code to build it all.

Current titles: Senior Systems Engineer, Cloud Engineer.
Location: Orange County, California.
Available for: AI consulting, cloud engineering, LLM integration, and automation engagements.

## Experience

- Big 5 Global Consulting Firm — Senior Systems Engineer (Feb 2023–Present)
- Healthcare Technology Firm — Cloud Systems Administrator (Sep 2021–Feb 2023)
- Construction Business — IT Support (Feb. 2019 - Sep. 2021)

## Core Competencies

Cloud & Infrastructure:
- Azure (expert): compute, storage, networking, security, data services
- AWS (proficient): EC2, S3, Lambda, VPC, IAM
- Infrastructure-as-Code: ARM/Bicep, Terraform, CloudFormation
- Containers: Docker, Kubernetes, ECS/EKS
- DevOps: GitHub Actions, Azure DevOps, CI/CD automation

Data & AI:
- Data platforms: Databricks, Palantir Foundry, Azure Synapse Analytics, Amazon Redshift
- ML infrastructure: Azure ML, model deployment, inference optimization
- ETL pipelines: Python/PySpark, real-time and batch processing
- LLM integration and AI automation

Development:
- Python (7+ years, expert), PowerShell (expert), Bash, SQL
- REST/GraphQL API design
- Distributed systems, microservices, event-driven architecture

Leadership:
- Led $500K+ technical platform implementations
- Partnered directly with C-level stakeholders at Fortune 500 firms
- Delivered strategic technical presentations to executive audiences

## Certifications

- Microsoft Certified: Azure AI Engineer (AI-102)
- Microsoft Certified: Azure Fundamentals (AZ-900)
- Microsoft Certified: Azure Administrator Associate (AZ-104, previously held)

## Services

AI integration, LLM solutions, cloud infrastructure consulting, automation engineering — available for small businesses and enterprise clients.
